name: Cameron Courts
description: Cameron Courts is home to four tennis courts that can be converted into 8 pickleball courts. There are four pickleball courts designated at a time, but the other four can be changed for a private reservation.
fees: Fee required — Multiple season passes available, but non-passholders are able to rent a court for a fee.

name: Leach Park - Minot
description: Come play pickleball at Leach Park - Minot in Minot, ND! The court surface is concrete. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Minot YMCA
description: Minot YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Minot, ND. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the courts.

name: Riverside Park - Minot
description: Riverside Park - Minot is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Minot, ND. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Roosevelt Park
description: Come play pickleball at Roosevelt Park in Minot, ND! There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
